task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Role-Based Access Control** (Level 8)

Build an API with role-based access. Users have roles (admin/editor/viewer). POST /api/articles creates articles (editors and admins only). DELETE /api/articles/:id deletes (admins only). GET /api/articles lists all (anyone with auth). Viewers can read but not create or delete.

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for javascript backend

create a Users table:
  email, required, unique
  password, required
  role, required

create a
final_source:
build for javascript backend

owner is 'test@example.com'
allow signup and login

create a Users table:
  email, required, unique
  password, required
  role, required

create an Articles table:
  title, required
  body
  author_id

when user calls POST /api/register sending user:
  validate user:
    email is text, required, matches email
  existing = get all Users where email is user's email
  guard length of existing is 0 or 'Email already registered'
    role is text, required
  existing = get all Users where email is user's email
  guard existing is empty or 'Email already registered'
  saved = save user to Users
  send back saved with status 201

when user calls POST /api/login sending credentials:
  validate credentials:
    email is text, required
    password is text, required
  found_users = get all Users where email is credentials's email
  found = first of found_users
  guard found is not empty or 'Invalid credentials'
  guard found's password is credentials's password or 'Invalid credentials'
  send back { token is 'jwt_' + found's id, user is found } with status 200

when user calls GET /api/articles:
  requires login
  articles = get all Articles
  send back articles

when user calls POST /api/articles sending article:
  requires login
  is_editor = caller's role is 'editor'
  is_admin = caller's role is 'admin'
  guard is_editor or is_admin or 'Only editors and admins can create articles'
  validate article:
    title is text, required
  article's author_id is caller's id
  saved = save article to Articles
  send back saved with status 201

when user calls DELETE /api/articles/:id:
  requires login
  guard caller's role is 'admin' or 'Only admins can delete articles'
  delete Article with this id
  send back 'deleted' with status 200
